Package com.enovka.gemini4j.client.exception

  • Exception Summary 
    Exception Description
    GeminiApiException
    Base class for all exceptions thrown by the Gemini4J library.
    GeminiFailedPreconditionException
    Thrown when a precondition is not met.
    GeminiInternalException
    Thrown when an unexpected error occurs on the server side.
    GeminiInvalidArgumentException
    Thrown when the request contains an invalid argument.
    GeminiNotFoundException
    Thrown when the requested resource is not found.
    GeminiPermissionDeniedException
    Thrown when the API key doesn't have sufficient permissions.
    GeminiResourceExhaustedException
    Thrown when the rate limit is exceeded.
    GeminiUnavailableException
    Thrown when the service is temporarily overloaded or unavailable.
